SpTU 1, 056 [list of ingredients][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[... KU₃].⸢BABBAR⸣ u₂IGI-lim gišKAN.U₅ [...]

[...] of silver, imhur-līm-plant, ...-wood [...]

o 2'2'

[...] na₄x x [...]

[...] ...-stone [...].

o 3'3'

⸢ZUBI⸣ KU₃.SI₂₂ na₄aš-pu₂-u kib-rit UḪ₂.d[ID₂ ...]

A throwing-stick of gold, jasper, kibrītu-sulphur, ruʾtītu-sulphur, [...].

o 4'4'

ZUBI ZABAR na₄AN.NA na₄⸢ZALAG₂?⸣ [...]

A throwing-stick of bronze, tin, zalāqu-stone [...].

o 5'5'

ZUBI AN.NA na₄it-ta-mir na₄KURnu.DAB

A throwing-stick of tin, ittamir-stone (and) magnetite.

o 6'6'

ZUBI gišŠINIG ia₄-ar₂-tu₄ na₄NI.BA

A throwing-stick of tamarisk, white coral (and) yānibu-stone.

o 7'7'

ZUBI gišTAŠKARIN na₄AŠ₃.GI₃.GI₃ na₄GIŠ.NU₁₁.GAL

A throwing-stick of taskarinnu-tree, turquoise (and) alabaster.

o 8'8'

ZUBI gišMES.MA₂.KAN.NA na₄AN.BAR na₄URUDU

A throwing-stick of Magan-tree, parzillu-stone (and) copper.

Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

r 2'2'

r 3'3'

(colophon)

x [... gišLE.U₅].UM [ZI]ḫa

r 5'5'

imGI₃.DA md⸢KUR⸣.GAL—ik-ṣu-ur₂
